data.body: STORY A a3d7 CLAIMED + TDD RED established. Authored full oracle: happy-path tests/unit/test_audit_serve.py (5 config round-trip tests + 1 in-process index-lists-ticket via TestClient) [SHARED w/ implementer]; held-out tests/unit/test_audit_serve_heldout.py (AC2 disabled-refuses-naming-flag + import-clean guard, AC3 missing-extra actionable msg via block_extra, AC4 host warning on 0.0.0.0 / none on 127.0.0.1, AC5/6 REAL uvicorn loopback bind on ephemeral --port lists seeded ticket, @allow_network). RED confirmed: 11 failed for right reasons (AttributeError no 'ui'; ImportError no server; serve unhandled), 1 passed = inert import-clean guard (stays green). Held-out file MOVED to job tmp so implementer subagent can't see it. Server contract for implementer: rebar.audit.server.create_app(repo_root=None)->FastAPI + serve(*, host,port,repo_root=None); serve arm added to _audit_commands.audit_cli dispatching serve/show; index enumerates audited tickets via audit_trail.
